warnings: This record is a MET observation of AI programming work items routed through AEX and PQX. It does not claim AEX admitted, PQX executed, EVL evaluated, CDE decided, or SEL enforced.
AEX is the canonical admission authority for repo-mutating execution. PQX is the canonical execution authority. EVL owns eval. CDE owns control. SEL owns enforcement.
Source signals are derived from per-work-item evidence records in artifacts/ai_programming/. Coverage is partial; unknowns remain visible by design.
AEX-PQX-DASH-02 is a bootstrap gap: the dashboard implementation itself lacks AEX and PQX evidence. This record explicitly surfaces that gap rather than hiding it.
